title: Nyf's Quivers
description: Adds 5 levels of Quivers to the Game that can be configured.
body:
# Nyfs Quivers

 

Nyfs Quivers adds currently 5 Quiver Sizes (Leather Through Netherite) to the Game which can hold between 9 and 45 stacks of arrows, it utilizes an "Active Slot" which you can toggle between

in order to choose which Arrow your bows will use!

 

 

 

New In Forge 1.18:
Melding Enchant, makes worn and held items with this enchant Invisible while you are also invisible.
Advanced ToolTips that show what is in the quiver while Shift is Held Down.

Keybind to open the Currently Equipped Quiver

New in Forge 1.18.2:
Cycling Enchant - Skips Empty Quiver Slots
Quinfinity Enchant - Limited Use Infinity for all Arrow Types. (Remove and Re-add the Enchant to refresh usage) removed in 1.21

Config Option to Scale the GUI Slot

![quiver](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/846584887955161120/921462006991712256/unknown.png)


Quivers can be Renamed with Shift Right Click.

 
1.21 and Above:
Requires Accessories.
 
1.20 and Below:
Nyf's Quivers FORGE REQUIRES Curios

 

Nyf's Quivers FABRIC REQUIRES Trinkets



   

 

Tawniey Created a [Wonderful Resource Pack!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/rustic-alternates-nyfs-quivers)
![tawniey](https://i.imgur.com/TQikBXf.png)

 

 

 

A HUGE THANKS TO 

SuperMartijn642
AND HIS MOD
PACKED UP

for laying the Groundwork in order for this mod to be completed.

[![bisectimage](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/f5d02e4d-0b48-4a61-9ecf-4b563eb97354.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/nyfsmods)
